personal.name: Ahmed Bilal Syed
personal.title: Full Stack Web Developer
personal.tagline: Building scalable web applications with modern technologies
personal.bio: Full Stack Web Developer with approximately 1.5 years of practical experience in web application development. Experienced in building modern web applications, developing responsive front-end interfaces, and integrating backend APIs. Passionate about building scalable applications, learning modern technologies, and solving real-world problems through software.

experience.description: Started as a Front-End Developer and later transitioned into a Full Stack Developer role.
highlights: Developed responsive web interfaces and integrated APIs for modern web applications
Worked with modern JavaScript frameworks and backend services to build scalable features
Collaborated with development teams to implement new product functionality
Improved application performance across multiple product areas

experience.description: Started professional career as a Web Development Intern gaining hands-on experience in modern development workflows.
highlights: Gained hands-on experience in HTML, CSS, JavaScript
Assisted in building and maintaining web applications
Learned industry development standards and practices
Contributed to real client projects under senior guidance

education.description: Studied core concepts of information technology, software engineering, and web development.

training.title: Advanced Web Development Program
training.description: Completed advanced training focused on modern web technologies, application architecture, and professional development workflows.

projects.title: LMS Portal
projects.description: A comprehensive Learning Management System portal for managing courses, students, and educational content. Features include course enrollment, progress tracking, and interactive learning modules.

projects.title: E-Commerce Site
projects.description: Modern e-commerce platform with seamless shopping experience, product filtering, cart management, and secure checkout process. Built for optimal performance and user engagement.

projects.title: Freelancer Assistance
projects.description: Platform designed to help freelancers manage their projects, track time, handle invoices, and connect with clients efficiently. Streamlines freelance workflow management.

projects.title: Khushhali Marketplace
projects.description: Multi-vendor e-commerce marketplace platform connecting buyers and sellers. Features vendor dashboards, product management, reviews system, and secure payment integration.
